appraisal.description: A cracked dressing-room hand mirror whose silver backing has peeled into the shape of a second face.

clues.result: The central crack splits the reflected face before it splits the glass.
UV light shows no maker's mark, only a second eye where the backing has lifted.
The mirror reaches room temperature only when its face is covered.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If kept intact, a second reflection remains after the mirror is covered.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Cracked Hand Mirror.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Cracked Hand Mirror.
